items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This regularly scheduled security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento (PolyShell)
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a full-page cache extension, allowing remote code execution via a crafted CacheWarmer cookie.

items.title: Adobe Security Bulletin for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities, including issues that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.id: PolyShell (no CVE provided, but described as critical)
items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store, with observed attacks on 79.5% of all stores.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized malicious code, and compromise store data.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Part of APSB26-05, this critical vulnerability allows attackers to execute code remotely, leading to a full system takeover.

items.title: Improper Access Control vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Addressed in APSB26-05, this critical flaw allows bypassing security filters to access restricted information, potentially leading to data leaks.

items.title: Stored XSS vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Included in APSB26-05, this critical vulnerability involves malicious scripts that can escalate user privileges, potentially leading to admin hijacking.

items.title: SessionReaper, unauthenticated RCE in Magento & Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This critical bug allows customer account takeover and unauthenticated remote code execution, with automated attacks observed against over 50% of all stores globally.
